Row.Text: Press a key combination for {1_ActionName}, or Escape to cancel
{1_Count : plural 1?{1_Count} tile revealed; other?{1_Count} tiles revealed;}
{1_Count : plural 1?{1_Count} barbarian outpost; other?{1_Count} barbarian outposts;}
{1_Count : plural 1?{1_Count} tribal village; other?{1_Count} tribal villages;}
Moves the CAI map cursor northwest
Moves the CAI map cursor northeast
Moves the CAI map cursor west
Moves the CAI map cursor east
Moves the CAI map cursor southwest
Moves the CAI map cursor southeast
Cycles to the previous world scanner category
Cycles to the next world scanner category
Cycles to the previous subcategory in the current world scanner category
Cycles to the next subcategory in the current world scanner category
Cycles to the previous group in the current world scanner subcategory
Cycles to the next group in the current world scanner subcategory
Cycles to the previous item in the current world scanner group
Cycles to the next item in the current world scanner group
Jump to current world scanner entry
Moves the CAI cursor to the current world scanner item or group
Returns the CAI cursor to the plot it occupied before the last world scanner jump
Speaks the direction from the CAI cursor to the currently selected world scanner item
Increases the Surveyor radius around the CAI cursor
Decreases the Surveyor radius around the CAI cursor
Reads total yields within the Surveyor radius around the CAI cursor
Reads visible resources within the Surveyor radius around the CAI cursor
Reads revealed terrain within the Surveyor radius around the CAI cursor
Reads friendly units within the Surveyor radius around the CAI cursor
Reads visible enemy units within the Surveyor radius around the CAI cursor
Reads known cities and barbarian camps within the Surveyor radius around the CAI cursor
{1_Count : plural 1?{1_Count} unexplored tile; other?{1_Count} unexplored tiles;}
Opens an accessible tree of current notifications
Opens an accessible list of current turn actions and blockers
Policies cannot be changed right now
Reads the current turn, time, and date from the top panel
Reads all top panel yield summaries, including gold and faith balances
Opens a tree of top panel yield breakdowns
Opens a list of top panel strategic resources
Opens the diplomacy action view through the top panel path
Toggles citizen management and tile purchase together
No city or district banner at the current cursor
No visible identity or status information
No visible growth or production information
Read city banner identity and status
Reads visible city or district banner identity, health, defense, and status information
Read city banner growth and influence
Reads visible city banner growth and production information
Reads visible city banner religion information, including lens details when open
Reads visible city banner diplomacy information such as owner, quests, and trading post state
Reads visible city banner loyalty percentage and breakdown information
Reads visible city banner governor information
Reads visible city banner power information
{1_Count} items added to queue, for {2_Cost} total culture
{1_Count} items added to queue, for {2_Cost} total science
Opens the vanilla research chooser from the World Tracker
Opens the vanilla civics chooser from the World Tracker
Reads current research, current civic, and total unit count
Selects the city center and enters city ranged attack targeting mode
Selects {1_Name} and enters district ranged attack targeting mode
Selects the city and enters nuclear strike targeting mode for {2_Text} from {1_Name}
Opens or closes the city overview panel
Opens the loyalty and governors tab
Opens the citizens and growth tab
Opens the citizen yield focus controls
Selects the previous unit cycling category
Selects the next unit cycling category
Selects the previous unit in the active unit category
Selects the next unit in the active unit category
Moves the selected unit one tile northwest, or previews combat before confirming
Moves the selected unit one tile northeast, or previews combat before confirming
Moves the selected unit one tile west, or previews combat before confirming
Moves the selected unit one tile east, or previews combat before confirming
Moves the selected unit one tile southwest, or previews combat before confirming
Moves the selected unit one tile southeast, or previews combat before confirming
Reads movement path details for the selected unit and CAI map cursor
Opens a list of this unit's special abilities
Opens a list of your units
Opens the available build improvement actions for this unit
Charges not supported for this unit
This unit is not in a formation
Read terrain features and natural wonders
Read movement cost, defense modifier, rivers, and cliffs
Read continent, appeal, workers, fallout, and national park
Reads the units on the current tile
Reads the current tile yields, river information, and owner
Reads movement cost, defense modifier, and appeal for the current tile
Reads the current tile coordinates relative to your original capital
Reads district, building, and great work information for the current tile
No yields, fresh water, river, or owner information
No districts or buildings on this tile
Reads information for the current interface target
{1_Turns : plural 1?Encounters combat this turn; other?Encounters combat in {1_Turns} turns;}
{1_Moves : plural 1?Moved, {1_Moves} move left; other?Moved, {1_Moves} moves left;}
{1_Turns : plural 1?Stopped short, 1 turn till arrival; other?Stopped short, {1_Turns} turns till arrival;}
Activates the focused accessibility widget or current interface action
Activates the secondary action for the focused accessibility widget or current interface action
Triggers the current ActionPanel action when available
Reads the summary for the current selection
Opens a list of actions for the current selection
No tutorial goals at the moment.
Opens a list of current tutorial goals.
Opens the accessible minimap lens list.
Already at the oldest history item
Already at the newest history item
